# JobsByCulture

> Culture-first job search for AI & tech professionals. Browse 4,873+ jobs filtered by culture values like async-first, work-life balance, remote-friendly, and ethical AI.

## About

JobsByCulture helps professionals find jobs at companies whose culture actually matches how they like to work. Instead of generic job boards, we tag every role with real culture data from employee reviews.

## Key Pages

- [Browse Jobs](https://jobsbyculture.com/jobs): 4,873+ AI & tech jobs filtered by 18 culture values, 12 role categories, and 8 locations
- [Compare Cultures](https://jobsbyculture.com/compare): Side-by-side company culture comparison tool
- [Company Directory](https://jobsbyculture.com/directory): All 29 profiled companies with ratings, values, and reviews
- [Culture Map](https://jobsbyculture.com/culture-map): Interactive scatter chart comparing all 29 companies by Glassdoor rating vs work-life balance

## Company Profiles

- [Anthropic](https://jobsbyculture.com/companies/anthropic): 4.4 Glassdoor, AI Safety, 95% recommend
- [Hugging Face](https://jobsbyculture.com/companies/huggingface): 3.8 Glassdoor, Open Source, 78% recommend

## Browse by Seniority

- [Entry / Junior Jobs](https://jobsbyculture.com/seniority/entry): Early-career roles at culture-first companies
- [Mid-Level Jobs](https://jobsbyculture.com/seniority/mid): Mid-level roles at companies that value culture
- [Senior Jobs](https://jobsbyculture.com/seniority/senior): Senior IC roles at top-rated AI & tech companies
- [Staff / Principal Jobs](https://jobsbyculture.com/seniority/staff): Staff and principal-level roles for deep experts
- [Lead / Manager Jobs](https://jobsbyculture.com/seniority/lead): Team lead and manager roles at culture-first companies
- [Director+ Jobs](https://jobsbyculture.com/seniority/director): Director, VP, and executive-level roles

## Blog — The Culture Report

Data-driven insights on AI company culture, work-life balance, and what it's actually like to work at top tech companies.

- [Best AI Companies for Work-Life Balance in 2026](https://jobsbyculture.com/blog/best-ai-companies-work-life-balance-2026): All 29 companies ranked by WLB score — from Vast AI (4.5) to Scale AI (2.7)
- [Anthropic vs OpenAI: Culture Compared](https://jobsbyculture.com/blog/anthropic-vs-openai-culture-comparison): Side-by-side comparison of Glassdoor ratings, culture values, compensation, and employee reviews
- [Remote-Friendly AI Companies Hiring in 2026](https://jobsbyculture.com/blog/remote-friendly-ai-companies-hiring-2026): 11 companies with genuine remote culture and real open roles
- [Flat Hierarchy in Tech](https://jobsbyculture.com/blog/flat-hierarchy-tech-companies): 8 companies where flat hierarchy is real — with Glassdoor data and employee reviews
- [Working at Anthropic in 2026](https://jobsbyculture.com/blog/working-at-anthropic-2026): Culture, compensation ($300k–$490k), Glassdoor ratings (4.4), and real employee reviews
- [Working at Stripe in 2026](https://jobsbyculture.com/blog/working-at-stripe-2026): Engineering culture, writing culture, compensation, and what 8,000 employees say
- [Working at Perplexity AI in 2026](https://jobsbyculture.com/blog/working-at-perplexity-2026): Highest Glassdoor (4.7) but low WLB (3.3) — the real story behind the AI search startup
- [Working at CoreWeave in 2026](https://jobsbyculture.com/blog/working-at-coreweave-2026): GPU cloud hypergrowth, $50B valuation, and what employees say about the culture
- [Best AI Companies to Work For in 2026](https://jobsbyculture.com/blog/best-ai-companies-to-work-for-2026): All 29 companies ranked by Glassdoor rating — from Vast AI (5.0) to Cohere (2.9)
- [Working at OpenAI in 2026](https://jobsbyculture.com/blog/working-at-openai-2026): Culture, compensation ($350k–$550k), Glassdoor ratings (4.5), and real employee reviews
- [Working at Databricks in 2026](https://jobsbyculture.com/blog/working-at-databricks-2026): 791 open jobs, $62B valuation, and what employees say about the data platform culture
- [Open Source AI Companies Hiring in 2026](https://jobsbyculture.com/blog/open-source-ai-companies-hiring-2026): 9 open source companies with 729 jobs — Hugging Face, LangChain, Vercel, and more

## Culture Values We Track

1. Work-Life Balance
2. Remote-Friendly
3. Flexible Hours
4. Async-First
5. Deep Work / Low Meetings
6. Transparent Culture
7. Flat Hierarchy
8. Diverse & Inclusive
9. Safe to Fail
10. Engineering-Driven
11. Ship Fast & Iterate
12. Open Source Culture
13. Learning & Growth
14. Strong Comp & Equity
15. Direct Product Impact
16. Wears Many Hats
17. Ethical AI / Safety
18. Mission-Driven

## Data Sources

Company culture ratings are sourced from Glassdoor employee reviews, public company culture documents, and verified employee feedback. AI-generated analysis uses Anthropic Claude for companies not yet profiled.

## Contact

Website: https://jobsbyculture.com
